scripts.check:web: bun run typecheck:web && bun run build:web
scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && GOCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-build GOMODCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-mod go test ./...
scripts.check:api: cd apps/api && GOCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-build GOMODCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-mod go test -race ./... && GOCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-build GOMODCACHE=$(pwd)/../../.cache/go-mod go vet ./...
scripts.check: bun run check:api && bun run check:web
